acceptance.native_wheel: build, install, and import pass; baseline extension has 16 KiB LOAD alignment; DT_NEEDED and RPATH/RUNPATH are diagnostic only
acceptance.profile_M: canonical header, preserved BUILD_GNU_TYPE/CONFIG_ARGS, effective clang/clang++/llvm-ar and Android identity
acceptance.promotion: withheld until the returned receipt is independently accepted in a later transaction
acceptance.uv: system and custom managed install/find/venv/reinstall/uninstall pass

launcher.source: accepted canonical full r4 launcher; source remains components/upstream-thin/src/python.c

implementation.temporary_install_only_projection: derived only from successor full python/install for uv qualification; not a release artifact

production_boundary.android_16k_alignment: hard distributor gate for distributed ELF objects and the baseline extension produced by profile M SDK flags
production_boundary.on_device_toolchain_overlay: CC/CXX/AR and measured compile/link flags only
production_boundary.user_built_wheel_postprocessing: out of scope; use external packaging or repair tooling

required_execution: assemble successor full twice from exact official input
prove the two full archives byte-identical, including artifact-embedded receipts that use deterministic install-relative semantics
verify full structure, manifest, LR-3, dependency closure, selected profile M metadata semantics, preserved producer provenance, and 16 KiB alignment for distributed ELF objects
qualify fresh extraction, relocation, subprocess, venv, imports, python-config, pkg-config, uv system and managed consumer paths on Android AArch64
build, install, and import a baseline native extension wheel; require 16 KiB LOAD alignment and record DT_NEEDED/RPATH/RUNPATH only as diagnostics
do not repair, rewrite, or make a portability claim for the user-built wheel
independently audit all identities and protect the frozen predecessor family
